subject: Cloud Computing
title: Disaster Recovery Strategies
description: A quick win: understand Disaster Recovery Strategies.

hook.text: An entire AWS region goes down. Your application is only in that region. Everything stops.

buildup.text: Disaster recovery strategies range from backup-restore (cheapest, slowest) to active-active (expensive, instant).

discovery.text: Pilot light keeps a minimal copy ready. Warm standby keeps a scaled-down version running. Both balance cost and speed.

twist.text: Most companies choose backup-restore and accept hours of downtime. Active-active costs 2-3x but recovers in seconds.

climax.text: The right strategy depends on your recovery time objective. How long can your business survive being offline?

punchline.text: Faster recovery costs more. Know what downtime costs you.

quiz.question: What determines which disaster recovery strategy is appropriate?
options: How long the business can survive being offline (recovery time objective)
The number of employees in the company
Which cloud provider the company uses
